title: peristethium polystachyum
intro: Peristethium polystachyum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It is a shrub that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, particularly in countries such as Costa Rica and Panama. Peristethium polystachyum has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures that offer health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function.
